svg.title: Dip Tube Tip Piece (Air Collection Bar) — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 1. MATERIAL: PETG (FDM), NYLON (SLS), OR RESIN (SLA) - FOOD SAFE
4. CROSS-SECTION DIAGONAL = 26.1 mm, FITS THROUGH 28 mm CAP OPENING (1.9 mm CLEARANCE)
5. SHIP-IN-A-BOTTLE ASSEMBLY: INSERT LENGTHWISE THROUGH CAP, ROTATE 90 DEG INSIDE BAG
6. AIR CHANNEL RIBS: TRIANGULAR, 2 mm TALL, 3 mm PITCH, TOP AND BOTTOM FACES
7. LONGITUDINAL GROOVE CONNECTS RIBS TO CENTRAL BORE FOR AIR COLLECTION
8. BORE: FDM VARIANT SHOWN (FRICTION FIT, 6.25 mm DIA, 1 mm x 45 DEG CHAMFER)
9. SLS/SLA VARIANT: BARB-RIDGE BORE, 6.35 mm NOM W/ 6.15 mm RIDGE (0.20 mm INTERFERENCE)
10. OPEN-ENDED SOCKET (TUBE DOES NOT BOTTOM OUT)
11. BAR WEDGES BETWEEN BAG SIDE SEAMS (185 mm > 182-184 mm INTERNAL CLEAR WIDTH)
13. INITIAL DESIGN VALUES - SUBJECT TO ITERATION AFTER PROTOTYPING
DIP TUBE TIP PIECE (AIR COLLECTION BAR)
